**Threshold triggered:** day axis (18/18)

---

## Signal Type: Recurring structural conflict (qualifies as recurring failure)

**Signal: Word-count conflict — agent.md (200 words) vs RATING-NOTES.md (350 words) for mayank-update mode**

**Signal strength:** HIGH — 16 consecutive observation windows, Sahadeva-escalated twice.

- Window 1 (2026-05-11): Operator session f5e77e7f produced a live narada draft at ~245 words. Narada itself flagged the word-count contradiction in its draft response. First observation.
- Windows 2–16 (2026-05-13 → 2026-05-28): Contradiction documented each window without resolution.
- Sahadeva 2026-W20 §8 rec 4 (2026-05-17): "Resolve the Narada word-count conflict. First live mayank-update draft will produce incorrect behavior. Quick decision: pick one number."
- Sahadeva 2026-W21 §9 rec 2 (2026-05-24): "Resolve the Narada word-count conflict. One edit, one number."
- 11 days since W20 escalation, 4 days since W21 escalation — no resolution.
- The conflict is non-deterministic in practice: narada will apply whichever file it consults first, producing either a 200-word or 350-word budget depending on read order.
- Supporting observations: 16 windows = far exceeds ≥3 threshold. Confidence: HIGH.

---

## Signal Type: Documented-but-unused

**Signal: N3, N6, N7, N8 — All live-run procedures unexercised**

**Signal strength:** LOW-MEDIUM — 18 days, 1 smoke test, 0 live drafts attributed to narada.

- N3 (voice-fingerprint refresh): voice-samples/ at 25/50 items means voice_calibration=default on every run. Not a failure — correctly handled by skill.md P2 branch 1.
- N6 (generic-reject filter, 3-attempt cap): 0 live drafts observed — not exercised.
- N7 (alternate openers for creator-dm): 0 live creator-dm sessions observed.
- N8 (draft-only scope): 0 live runs to verify boundary holds.
- These are operational gaps due to low invocation frequency, not skill.md errors.
- Signal count: 3 windows without any live run (structural absence) — but all 18 days had no live run. Meets ≥3 threshold for absence signal.

---

## Signal Type: Undocumented behavior

**Signal strength:** NONE qualifying. The only undocumented event (live draft at ~245 words in f5e77e7f) was operator-directed and itself surfaced the word-count conflict.

Band: **medium-low**. Above ≥40 floor — proposal fires.

---

## Patterns Qualifying for Proposal

**QP-N-WORDCOUNT:** The word-count conflict (agent.md 200 words vs RATING-NOTES.md 350 words) is the sole qualifying signal with HIGH confidence (16 observations, Sahadeva-escalated). The proposal will contain a unified diff resolving this to a single authoritative value.

**Decision context for Kartavya:**

- 200 words (agent.md): current operational cap, matches the mayank-update hard-rule spirit (concise, message-format content).
- 350 words (RATING-NOTES.md): launch-day ceiling, potentially allowing for richer narrative in high-stakes update posts.
- The proposal will offer 200 as the default recommendation (agent.md is the authoritative skills file; RATING-NOTES.md is a reference note) but the final choice belongs to Kartavya.
